overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring an underground industrial facility with green-tinted lighting, metal walkways, and graffiti-covered walls. The character moves through foggy corridors and past industrial containers in a sci-fi setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial loading platform with storage containers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an open industrial platform area with large cylindrical containers and green lighting

entered.detail: large white cylindrical storage tanks with green accents
vertical green glowing lights mounted on the far wall
safety railings along the edge of the platform
rough brown rock face forming the cavern wall
vent releasing white steam or smoke

segments.scene_description: The character begins in an open industrial platform area with large cylindrical containers on the right and green indicator lights visible in the distance. The environment features metal railings and rocky cavern walls with steam vents emitting vapor.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with safety railings and descending ramp

events.description: moving from open platform to narrow elevated walkway with metal railings
turning left and beginning to descend a ramp

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated walkway and descending a ramp alongside rocky walls

entered.detail: grated metal flooring of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open platform onto a narrow elevated walkway with metal railings, descending a ramp alongside rocky cavern walls. The industrial cylinders and green lights disappear from view as the character navigates the descent.

events.description: entering narrow corridor with walls covered in colorful graffiti
approaching area with rubble and debris scattered on the ground

agents.ego_description: moving into a narrow corridor with graffiti-covered walls and approaching a debris field

entered.detail: concrete wall covered with colorful spray-painted graffiti tags
pile of rubble and broken concrete blocking part of the path
closed metal door at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow maintenance corridor where the walls are covered in colorful graffiti. The metal railings and ramp are left behind as the character approaches a debris pile and a closed metal door at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy rubble-filled tunnel with large pipes

events.description: visibility decreases significantly due to thick fog or mist

agents.ego_description: navigating carefully through a foggy area filled with rubble and large industrial pipes

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial pipe lying on the ground
thick greenish fog reducing visibility throughout the area

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a fog-filled section of the facility where visibility is significantly reduced. Large industrial pipes lie among the rubble on the gravel floor, and the graffiti walls fade from view as the mist thickens.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an industrial cavern that transitions from an open platform into a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded corridor. It begins on an expansive industrial platform flanked by large cylindrical containers and green indicator lights, with steam venting from the surrounding rocky walls. As the camera moves forward, it leaves the open area to descend a narrow elevated ramp, causing the cylinders and distant lights to vanish behind the cavern walls. The scene then shifts into a tight maintenance corridor where the industrial architecture gives way to colorful graffiti, leading the character past piles of debris toward a closed metal door. Finally, the graffiti fades from view as the camera enters a dense fog, where visibility drops and the path opens into a rubble-strewn area filled with large industrial pipes.
